title: Leadership and direction clarity
narrative: Employees respond well when leaders explain why decisions are being made, how priorities connect to strategy, and what tradeoffs matter most. The comments suggest that clarity is not just a communications issue; it is a major driver of confidence and execution quality.

title: Cross-team operating flow
narrative: The organization has many pockets of strong collaboration, but handoffs remain inconsistent across functions and locations. Employees want clearer decision rights, more dependable follow-through, and shared working norms at team boundaries.

title: Workload sustainability
narrative: People are committed to the work and often willing to stretch, but sustained pace is a concern in lower-scoring pockets. Comments point to the need for better sequencing, stronger capacity planning, and more realistic workload management.
